# AgentNet AI

AgentNet is an open ecosystem for interoperable AI agents and coordination patterns, with practical reference implementations for identity, discovery, resolution, and orchestration.

These repositories provide implementation guidance aligned to the Agent Network Specification (ANS) Core v2.0 and are intended as reference implementations.

## Start Here

Follow this progression to understand the core AgentNet flow:

1. **Capsulizer** - Package capabilities and metadata into portable agent capsules.
2. **Registrar** - Register and publish agent/service records.
3. **Resolver** - Resolve identities, records, and routing information.
4. **Orchestrator** - Coordinate multi-agent execution and workflows.

## Repositories

- [agentnet-ai/agentnet](https://github.com/agentnet-ai/agentnet) - Core specification, standards discussion, and project governance.
- [agentnet-ai/ant-capsulizer](https://github.com/agentnet-ai/ant-capsulizer) - Reference implementation for capsule packaging.
- [agentnet-ai/ant-registrar](https://github.com/agentnet-ai/ant-registrar) - Reference implementation for registration services.
- [agentnet-ai/ant-resolver](https://github.com/agentnet-ai/ant-resolver) - Reference implementation for lookup and resolution.
- [agentnet-ai/ant-orchestrator](https://github.com/agentnet-ai/ant-orchestrator) - Reference implementation for orchestration and runtime coordination.

## Learn More

- Website: [agent-net.ai](https://agent-net.ai)
